sourceTitle: GenAI and academic integrity in assessment — UCL
evidenceSnippetOriginal: It's okay to use GenAI to help with spelling and grammar, and even with the tone of your language. However, make sure it isn't changing the content and meaning of what you've written. You should always understand the work you submit.
